title: QA Bug Report — Checkout Flow v2 Integration
author: kai.torres
content:
# QA Bug Report — Checkout Flow v2 Integration

**Reporter:** Kai Torres, QA Engineer
**Date:** 2026-04-25 07:55 AM PT
**Severity:** P0 — Launch Blocker
**Status:** Open (blocking QA sign-off)

## Summary
Checkout flow smoke test fails on staging. API endpoint returns 404. Launch page integration has not been updated to use the v2 checkout API.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Open https://staging.novaloop.io/launch
2. Add a product to cart
3. Click "Checkout with AI Assistant"
4. Observe: 404 error from API at /v1/checkout

## Expected Behavior
Checkout flow completes, AI assistant activates, session ID returned.

## Actual Behavior
```
HTTP 404 Not Found
GET https://api.novaloop.io/v1/checkout

{"error": "endpoint_not_found", "message": "Use /v2/checkout"}
```

## Root Cause
The v2 API migration (completed 2026-04-25 01:45 AM) moved the endpoint to /v2/checkout. The launch page integration was not updated. Tracked in NOVA-142.

## Impact
- QA sign-off is blocked until NOVA-142 resolves
- Launch cannot proceed on Monday without QA green

## Workaround
None. Code change required.

## Related Tickets
- NOVA-142 (engineering fix — blocked)
- NOVA-143 (this QA hold)
